assertion_results.text: Tasks target both 'trustify-backend' and 'trustify-ui' repositories with at least one task per repo
assertion_results.evidence: Tasks 1-3 each have '## Repository\ntrustify-backend'. Tasks 4-6 each have '## Repository\ntrustify-ui'. Three tasks per repo, satisfying the at-least-one requirement for both.

assertion_results.text: Backend tasks have lower task numbers than the frontend tasks that depend on them
assertion_results.evidence: Backend tasks are numbered 1, 2, 3. Frontend tasks are numbered 4, 5, 6. Task 4 (frontend) depends on Task 3 (backend). Task 2 depends on Task 1, Task 3 depends on Task 2, Task 5 depends on Task 4, Task 6 depends on Task 5. All backend task numbers (1-3) are lower than all frontend task numbers (4-6).

assertion_results.text: Frontend tasks reference Figma design context mentioning specific PatternFly components and visual specifications
assertion_results.evidence: Task 5 (SbomComparePage) explicitly references PatternFly components: Select (single-select, typeahead), ExpandableSection, Badge (with colors: green, red, blue, yellow), EmptyState with CodeBranchIcon, Skeleton, Button, Dropdown, composable Table, SeverityBadge. It specifies visual details like badge colors per section, critical severity row highlighting, and section order matching Figma. Task 6 references PatternFly Table select variant, Button, and Tooltip for disabled state accessibility.

assertion_results.text: At least one frontend task explicitly depends on a backend task in its Dependencies section
assertion_results.evidence: Task 4 (frontend, trustify-ui) contains '## Dependencies\n- Depends on: Task 3 -- Add comparison REST endpoint and integration tests'. Task 3 is a backend task (trustify-backend).

assertion_results.text: Frontend tasks reference paths from repo-frontend.md; backend tasks reference paths from repo-backend.md
assertion_results.evidence: Backend tasks reference paths from repo-backend.md: Task 1 references modules/fundamental/src/sbom/model/mod.rs, modules/fundamental/src/sbom/model/summary.rs, modules/fundamental/src/advisory/model/summary.rs. Task 2 references modules/fundamental/src/sbom/service/sbom.rs, entity/src/sbom_package.rs, entity/src/package.rs, common/src/db/query.rs. Task 3 references modules/fundamental/src/sbom/endpoints/get.rs, tests/api/sbom.rs, server/src/main.rs. All exist in repo-backend.md. Frontend tasks reference paths from repo-frontend.md: Task 4 references src/api/models.ts, src/api/rest.ts, src/api/client.ts, src/hooks/useSbomById.ts. Task 5 references src/components/SeverityBadge.tsx, src/routes.tsx, src/hooks/useSboms.ts, tests/mocks/handlers.ts. Task 6 references src/pages/SbomListPage/SbomListPage.tsx, src/components/FilterToolbar.tsx. All exist in repo-frontend.md.

assertion_results.text: Every generated task description contains a Repository section with a single repository name (not multiple repos per task)
assertion_results.evidence: All six tasks have a '## Repository' section with exactly one repository name: Task 1 'trustify-backend', Task 2 'trustify-backend', Task 3 'trustify-backend', Task 4 'trustify-ui', Task 5 'trustify-ui', Task 6 'trustify-ui'. No task lists multiple repositories.

assertion_results.text: Every generated task description contains Description, Acceptance Criteria, and Test Requirements sections as required by the handoff contract in task-description-template.md
assertion_results.evidence: All six task files contain '## Description', '## Acceptance Criteria', and '## Test Requirements' sections. Task 1: Description at line 4, Acceptance Criteria at line 35, Test Requirements at line 42. Task 2: Description at line 4, Acceptance Criteria at line 36, Test Requirements at line 47. Task 3: Description at line 4, Acceptance Criteria at line 41, Test Requirements at line 49. Task 4: Description at line 4, Acceptance Criteria at line 43, Test Requirements at line 50. Task 5: Description at line 4, Acceptance Criteria at line 49, Test Requirements at line 63. Task 6: Description at line 4, Acceptance Criteria at line 26, Test Requirements at line 35.

assertion_results.text: File paths in Files to Modify and Files to Create reference paths from the corresponding mock repository structure manifests (repo-backend.md or repo-frontend.md), not invented paths
assertion_results.evidence: All modified files exist in manifests: Task 1 modifies modules/fundamental/src/sbom/model/mod.rs (in repo-backend.md). Task 2 modifies modules/fundamental/src/sbom/service/mod.rs (in repo-backend.md). Task 3 modifies modules/fundamental/src/sbom/endpoints/mod.rs, server/src/main.rs (both in repo-backend.md). Task 4 modifies src/api/models.ts, src/api/rest.ts (both in repo-frontend.md). Task 5 modifies src/routes.tsx, tests/mocks/handlers.ts (both in repo-frontend.md). Task 6 modifies src/pages/SbomListPage/SbomListPage.tsx (in repo-frontend.md). All created files are plausible extensions under existing directories: comparison.rs under existing model/, compare.rs under existing service/ and endpoints/, sbom_compare.rs under existing tests/api/, useSbomComparison.ts under existing src/hooks/, SbomComparePage/ under existing src/pages/ following the page directory convention.

assertion_results.text: Implementation Notes in every task reference specific file paths and code patterns from the repository, not abstract or generic guidance
assertion_results.evidence: Task 1 references modules/fundamental/src/sbom/model/summary.rs, modules/fundamental/src/sbom/model/details.rs, specific derive macros (Serialize, Deserialize, Clone, Debug, ToSchema), and the AdvisorySummary severity field. Task 2 references modules/fundamental/src/sbom/service/sbom.rs, SbomService methods (fetch, list), entity/src/sbom_package.rs, entity/src/package.rs, entity/src/sbom_advisory.rs, entity/src/package_license.rs, common/src/db/query.rs, common/src/error.rs, tokio::try_join!. Task 3 references modules/fundamental/src/sbom/endpoints/get.rs and list.rs with specific handler signature patterns, CompareParams struct, .route("/compare", get(compare)), tests/api/sbom.rs patterns. Task 4 includes TypeScript code snippets referencing src/api/client.ts, src/api/rest.ts fetchSboms() pattern, src/hooks/useSbomById.ts useQuery pattern. Task 5 references src/hooks/useSboms.ts, src/components/SeverityBadge.tsx, src/pages/SbomDetailPage/components/PackageTable.tsx, src/pages/SbomDetailPage/components/AdvisoryList.tsx with specific usage guidance. Task 6 references PatternFly composable table checkbox pattern, useState<string[]>([]), useNavigate, src/components/FilterToolbar.tsx.
